sub_modules.aes_sbox: Combinational AES S-box lookup for one byte.
sub_modules.aes_subbytes: Applies the AES S-box independently to all 16 state bytes.
sub_modules.aes_shiftrows: Performs the AES ShiftRows byte permutation.
sub_modules.aes_mixcolumns: Performs AES MixColumns using combinational GF(2^8) arithmetic.
sub_modules.aes_key_expand: Computes the next AES-128 round key from the previous round key and round number.
sub_modules.aes_round: Implements one standard AES encryption round: SubBytes, ShiftRows, MixColumns, AddRoundKey.
sub_modules.aes_final_round: Implements the final AES encryption round without MixColumns.
